reasoning: The panel_inventory_v01 sprite itself has solid fairy-tale-adjacent design: ornate golden/amber frame, parchment/cream interior, rounded item slots, and green leaf decorations at top and bottom. These elements align with the warm parchment-and-gold adventure aesthetic. However the base scene surrounding the panel is a dark teal grid with crimson dungeon floor tiles — clearly dungeon-crawler territory. The panel does not negatively shift the mood; it actually brings the warmest, most fairy-tale-aligned element into the frame. But as a composite the overall image reads as dungeon-RPG with a nice UI panel rather than 'bright sunny magical toy diorama.' Within the panel, several inventory items use muted brown/grey tones that further soften the 'cute saturated' target. The sprite passes as a unit but cannot fully rescue the scene's dark baseline context.
